name: S'mores
recipeInstructions:
1. Break graham crackers in half. Halve the chocolate bar and place one section on each of the two graham cracker halves. Top each with a marshmallow. Place on paper towel.
2. Microwave at HIGH (100%) for 10 to 15 seconds or until marshmallow puffs. Top each with another graham cracker half. Press gently. Let stand 1 minute to soften chocolate. Serve immediately.
Conventional Method:
Center half of the chocolate bar on each of two graham cracker halves. Place remaining graham crackers on a cookie sheet, top each with a marshmallow. Broil for 30 seconds or until marshmallows are golden brown. Invert onto chocolate-topped graham crackers and press gently. Let stand 1 minute to soften chocolate. Serve immediately.
